summary: Backend testing for iteration 37 (seasonal events CRUD) + non-regression of iteration 35 (recommendations diversity). Both test suites: 19/19 tests pass. The fix to GET /api/seasonal-events/active (including 'active' field in projection) is verified working - in May 2026 active returns null, creating a May event makes it active, deletion brings it back to null. Trending + personalised recommendations diversity (<50% overlap across 3 calls) is also confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~3958 lines; consider splitting into routers (events, recommendations, auth, users, admin) for maintainability - exceeds the 700-line guideline.

_is_event_currently_active uses datetime.now(timezone.utc) - if WaveWatch targets primarily a French audience, consider Europe/Paris for boundary days (Halloween Oct 31 23:30 Paris would be Oct 31 22:30 UTC = OK, but New Year crossing windows could matter). Low priority.

Seed seasonal-events docs use string `_id` which is correct, but the public list endpoint /api/seasonal-events does NOT include `bonus_genres` / `bonus_content_types` (only the /active endpoint does) - if frontend SeasonalBanner needs them in lists too, expose them. Currently fine since AutoThemeApplier uses /active.
Admin POST returns 200 (not 201) on creation - minor REST convention deviation but consistent with existing endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Test creates and cleans up TEST_-prefixed seasonal events using uuid suffixes; cleanup fixture deletes each created event. The test_delete_event_removes_from_active test deletes the event it creates inline. No leftover test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 covers seasonal events CRUD + iteration 35 recos diversity non-regression - both green. Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration37_seasonal_events.py (11 tests) and /app/backend/tests/test_iteration35_recommendations_diversity.py (8 tests). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL must be exported when running pytest from /app (root .env not auto-loaded). Frontend components SeasonalBanner/AutoThemeApplier/EventsAdminPanel were NOT tested (explicit backend-only request).
rca of the issue: The previous iteration 35 trending diversity bug and the seasonal events /active projection bug (active field excluded from MongoDB projection -> _is_event_currently_active always returned False) are both confirmed fixed by this run. Reproduction: prior to the fix, GET /api/seasonal-events/active would always return {event: null} even when an event covered the current date, because the projection in db.seasonal_events.find() omitted the 'active' field, so _is_event_currently_active short-circuited at `if not evt.get('active')`. Mitigation already applied: 'active': 1 added to the projection (server.py L3839).
